concerns.text: FR-006 states 'Constitution Principle VII is satisfied via effect sizes with confidence intervals for census data.' Constitution Principle VII (census-data exception) explicitly states 'p-values and confidence intervals are NOT required' for census analyses. This is a direct contradiction—implementers cannot know if FR-006 is satisfied when the Constitution says CIs are not required. Remove 'with confidence intervals' from FR-006 to align with Constitution.
